governing_truth.v2b5_scope: Freezes Field Plan ingestion foundation; does not prove safe recruit, bind, permission, and activate of real leaders

genuinely_operational: Operator Command reflects live system truth
Director is a real inspection and oversight hub
College Command contains the strongest working KPI implementation
Field Plan structure frozen through V2-B.5
Twelve modular work packages define remaining build
must_not_overstate: Volunteer Manager is largely a shell
County Volunteer Command is largely a shell
Most command boards are not complete work environments
Postgres and production RBAC are not active
L4 execution is not real until identity, invitations, persistence, permissions, and auditability are proven

july14_meeting.finding: 04–034 were not pre-keyed; leaves 01–34 freeze exact i18n/presentation language; item 04=Chance and Xay; 34 aliases 034

next_meaningful_threshold: WP-01 + WP-03 together: a real person safely bound to a real position inside a real geographic command
non_negotiables: Vision → Product Truth → Journey Certification → Implementation → Deployment
Soft beta credible ≠ launch readiness certified
Invite-chain WP-01 CERTIFIED is named launch blocker
WP-01 must not be CERTIFIED on static seed or temporary browser state alone
Persistence remains netlify_blobs + static_seed until dual-write proven
Do not invent Field Plan doctrine or Benton organizing zones
No personnel assign until Postgres + RBAC
Registration, VCI, and launch-team goals remain distinct
Commit and push after every ship interaction
Authoritative Burt artifacts are markdown/JSON twins; local Cursor canvas is not required
hard_guardrails: Do not invent Benton County organizing zones
Do not infer political doctrine from geography
Do not treat placeholder personnel as real people
Do not create fake task completion data
Do not restore the superseded 25% formula
Do not present a shell as an operational command board
Do not mark invitations certified because a route renders
Do not enable sensitive personnel controls without production persistence and RBAC

parallel_build.WP-01: Who may enter, how they are assigned, whether assignment can be trusted
parallel_build.WP-03: Where the organization operates, which positions are needed, what Field Plan requires
parallel_build.together: Safe bind of a real person to a real position inside a real geographic command

work_packages.title: Invite Evidence and Certification
work_packages.acceptance: Evidence matrix filed; package status CERTIFIED only after production-like chain inspected — not on seed or browser-only state

work_packages.title: Dashboard honesty pass
work_packages.acceptance: No live 25% campus claims; shells labeled; demo leaders tagged DEMO; activeBuildLane matches tip

work_packages.title: Benton County L2 Geographic Depth
work_packages.acceptance: Benton L2 contract filled from real Field Plan only; areas, leadership requirements, separate goal lanes, source citations; vacancy honest; no invented zones

work_packages.title: Bind L1 into /leader/:id for content-backed seats
work_packages.acceptance: Leader shell shows responsibilities + KPIs from library for mapped content seats

work_packages.title: Clear V2-B.2 mapping queues
work_packages.acceptance: media/logistics mapped or explicitly deferred in UI; community_outreach conflict resolved

work_packages.title: Placeholder hierarchy prose (L1 completion)
work_packages.acceptance: 6 placeholder seats → ingested → re-wire KPIs → refresh B.5 freeze; 0 personnel assigns

work_packages.title: Field Plan L3 phase×place packs (pilot)
work_packages.acceptance: At least one Benton event_lead phase pack with checklist + kpi_ids + source_reference

work_packages.title: Admin chrome diet
work_packages.acceptance: Doctrine tabs behind Architecture library; Op Command / Director / VC / College first-class

work_packages.title: Participant copy demilitarize
work_packages.acceptance: /invite /choose-place /network use belong language; Command jargon behind lead roles

work_packages.title: Postgres dual-write design (no cutover)
work_packages.acceptance: Entity list + fail-closed plan for invite/place/network; cutover blocked until WP-01 CERTIFIED

work_packages.title: Return + share journey stubs
work_packages.acceptance: V1-JRN-RETURN-01 and V1-JRN-SHARE-01 human-tested with evidence stubs

work_packages.title: Thin Assurance strip (V2-F seed)
work_packages.acceptance: Op Command or strip shows journey statuses, tip SHA, Flat-25 absence, Postgres=off
